mapper.sql: account, password, name, status, remark, create_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE `cas_admin` SET
account = #{data.account}, password = #{data.password}, name = #{data.name}, status = #{data.status}, remark = #{data.remark},
WHERE id = #{data.id} AND delete_time is null
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `cas_admin` WHERE account = #{account} AND delete_time IS NULL
SELECT * FROM `cas_admin` WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time is null
SELECT * FROM `cas_admin` WHERE delete_time is null order by id desc
mapper.delete:
UPDATE `cas_admin` SET delete_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{item}
